product_materials_client_read.name: product_materials_client_read
product_materials_client_read.using: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM products p WHERE p.id = product_id AND p.tenant_id = current_setting('request.jwt.claim.tenant_id', true))

pickup_lines_client_read.name: pickup_lines_client_read
pickup_lines_client_read.using: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pickups p WHERE p.id = pickup_id AND p.tenant_id = current_setting('request.jwt.claim.tenant_id', true))

pickup_lines_client_insert.name: pickup_lines_client_insert
pickup_lines_client_insert.withCheck: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pickups p WHERE p.id = pickup_id AND p.tenant_id = current_setting('request.jwt.claim.tenant_id', true))

pickups_transport_read.name: pickups_transport_read
pickups_transport_read.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM transport_provider_clients tpc
        JOIN transport_providers tp ON tp.id = tpc.transport_provider_id
        WHERE tpc.tenant_id = pickups.tenant_id
          AND tp.user_id::text = current_setting('request.jwt.claim.sub', true)
      )

outbound_shipment_pickups_transport_read.name: outbound_shipment_pickups_transport_read
outbound_shipment_pickups_transport_read.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM outbound_shipments os
        JOIN transport_providers tp ON tp.id = os.transport_provider_id
        WHERE os.id = outbound_shipment_id
          AND tp.user_id::text = current_setting('request.jwt.claim.sub', true)
      )

outbound_shipments_transport_read.name: outbound_shipments_transport_read
outbound_shipments_transport_read.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM transport_providers tp
        WHERE tp.id = outbound_shipments.transport_provider_id
          AND tp.user_id::text = current_setting('request.jwt.claim.sub', true)
      )

outbound_shipments_transport_update.using:

EXISTS (

        FROM transport_providers tp

intake_lines_prison_select.name: intake_lines_prison_select
intake_lines_prison_select.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM intake_records ir
        WHERE ir.id = intake_lines.intake_record_id
          AND ir.prison_facility_id::text = current_setting('request.jwt.claim.facility_id', true)
      )

intake_lines_prison_insert.name: intake_lines_prison_insert
intake_lines_prison_insert.withCheck:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM intake_records ir
        WHERE ir.id = intake_lines.intake_record_id
          AND ir.prison_facility_id::text = current_setting('request.jwt.claim.facility_id', true)
      )
